pages.text: Inspired by Ars Nouveau's spell builder, $(l)Augment Glyphs$() let you customize each spell beyond carrier+element+effect.$(br2)$(l)8 augment types$(), each with a unique effect:$(br)$(l)Amplify$() вЂ” +25%% damage / +20%% mana / +5%% cd per stack (max 4)$(br)$(l)Dampen$() вЂ” mana Г—0.7, cd Г—1.4 (unique)$(br)$(l)Quickfire$() вЂ” mana Г—1.3, cd Г—0.5 (unique)$(br)$(l)Split$() вЂ” 1 в†’ 3 fan-shot (unique)

$(l)4 advanced (projectile-affecting):$()$(br)$(l)Pierce$() вЂ” passes through enemies (max 3)$(br)$(l)Chain$() вЂ” redirects to next enemy after hit (unique)$(br)$(l)Extend$() вЂ” projectile lifetime +50%%/stack (max 3)$(br)$(l)Homing$() вЂ” auto-tracks nearest enemy (unique)$(br2)$(l)Stack-able vs unique:$() check tooltip for max stack.

$(l)How to apply:$()$(br)1. Inscribe a spell into a Spellbook slot first.$(br)2. Hold Glyph in $(l)offhand$(), spellbook in main hand.$(br)3. Right-click в†’ glyph injected into $(l)active slot$().$(br)4. Cycle slots with sneak + right-click.$(br2)One spell can stack multiple types (e.g., AmplifyГ—4 + PierceГ—3 + Homing for an unstoppable seeking projectile).

$(l)Sources:$()$(br)$(l)Amplify$() вЂ” 100%% drop from Warden / Weaver / Avatar$(br)$(l)Dampen$() вЂ” 15%% from Witch$(br)$(l)Quickfire$() вЂ” 8%% from Phantom$(br)$(l)Split$() вЂ” 4%% from Creeper$(br)$(l)Pierce$() вЂ” 1%% from Skeleton$(br)$(l)Chain$() вЂ” 5%% from Blaze$(br)$(l)Extend$() вЂ” 5%% from Enderman$(br)$(l)Homing$() вЂ” 8%% from Ghast

$(l)Crafting fallback:$()$(br)Each glyph can also be crafted shapeless from:$(br)1 Refined Magic Crystal + 1 Element Drop + 1 Theme Item + 1 Diamond/Gold + 1 Paper.$(br2)Example: Amplify = refined_crystal + element_eldritch + redstone_block + diamond + paper$(br2)Element Drops come from element-themed mobs (R10 GLM).
